title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Verify device deletion from device list works correctly when multiple devices are paired, with remaining devices retaining correct connected/disconnected state
steps: 1. Pair and connect at least 3 Bluetooth audio devices to the phone via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Power off 2 of the 3 connected devices.
4. On the Home screen, locate the device list and delete one device (e.g., swipe to remove or tap the delete/remove option).
5. Observe the remaining devices in the list.
6. Delete each remaining device one by one from the device list.
expected: The deleted device is properly removed from the device list. The remaining devices are still displayed with correct connected/disconnected state (e.g., the powered-off devices show as disconnected, the powered-on device shows as connected). All remaining devices can be deleted one by one without errors.
